data.title: Justin Sun: Exposing the FDT fraud incident stems from my inner sense of justice and my love for Hong Kong
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Sun Yuchen said at the press conference that the core reason for exposing the FDT fraud incident was his inner sense of justice and love for Hong Kong, and he believed that Hong Kong, as a global financial center, did not want to see such a fraud loophole happen in Hong Kong.

data.title: XRP Faces Critical Support Level Amid Tariff Concerns
data.description:
According to CoinDesk, the payments-focused cryptocurrency XRP is trading near a crucial support zone around $2, a level that could confirm a significant topping pattern and signal a renewed downtrend. This pattern, known as the head-and-shoulders formation, consists of three peaks, with the middle peak being the highest. The neckline, a horizontal line drawn from the base of these peaks, marks the key demand zone for XRP.

Since January, the $1.90-$2 range has served as this demand zone for XRP. A price movement below this range would trigger a breakdown of the head-and-shoulders pattern, indicating a shift from a bullish to a bearish trend. Veteran analyst and trader Peter Brandt suggests that a potential breakdown could see XRP's price nearly halve to $1.07. Chart analysts use the measure move method to identify targets, which involves calculating the distance from the top of the head to the neckline and subtracting that distance from the breakdown point, in this case, $2.

On the upside, XRP bulls need to overcome the $3 level, which represents the lower high created in early March. This level is crucial for any potential bullish momentum. As the market navigates the risks associated with tariffs, XRP's price action remains closely watched by traders and analysts alike, with the $2 support level being a pivotal point for future movements.

data.title: FDT responded to Sun Yuchen's accusation: This is a typical smear campaign. FDT will take legal action and will hold a Space Q&A session at 15:00 today.
BitMart Market Report: The capital market is bearish in the future
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to BitMart's market report on April 3, the total market value of the cryptocurrency market is 2.68 trillion US dollars, down 1.45% from the previous day. BTC fell sharply after rising to $88,500. The time of the decline was almost the same as when Trump announced the global reciprocal tariff policy. The capital market was bearish in the future; ETH followed the market ups and downs, rising to $1,950 and then falling back to around $1,800; altcoins generally fell, and the market value of many altcoins has fallen by more than 90% from their historical highs; the comprehensive long-short ratio is 1.03, and market sentiment is still sluggish. The US unemployment rate and US non-agricultural employment data for March will be announced at 20:30 on the evening of April 4, Beijing time. At 23:25 on the evening of the same day, Federal Reserve Chairman Powell will give a speech. At that time, the market may fluctuate greatly, and investors need to pay attention to risks.

data.title: North Korean Hackers Profit from Recent Cryptocurrency Sale
data.description: According to Odaily, the Lazarus Group, a North Korean hacking organization, recently sold 40.78 Wrapped Bitcoin (WBTC), valued at approximately $3.51 million. The group made a profit of $2.51 million from this transaction. Initially, they purchased the WBTC in February 2023 for around $999,900 at a price of $24,521 per WBTC. Twelve hours ago, they converted the WBTC into 1,857 Ethereum (ETH) and subsequently distributed the ETH across three different wallets.

data.title: Justin Sun: $500 million is not a lot for me. I am happy to help TUSD and its users avoid its potential risks.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Sun Yuchen said at the press conference: "Techteryx came to me after the funds were misappropriated. $500 million is not a lot for me. I am also happy to help TUSD and users avoid its potential risks."

data.title: StakeStone has opened an airdrop query website
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to official news, StakeStone has opened the airdrop inquiry website.

data.title: Justin Sun reveals the incident of FDT and others misappropriating nearly $500 million in custodial assets and calls for regulators to intervene and regulate the industry
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Sun Yuchen, founder of TRON, disclosed at a press conference that after providing financial assistance to Techteryx's stablecoin TUSD, it was found that financial institutions including Hong Kong trust company First Digital Trust Limited (FDT) and Legacy Trust Company Limited (Legacy Trust) and a private company in Dubai illegally misappropriated TUSD's $456 million in fiat currency reserves. Sun Yuchen said that Vincent Chok, CEO and director of FDT and Legacy Trust, approved the illegal transfer of public assets, which harmed the public's rights and interests and also jeopardized Hong Kong's reputation as a global financial center. Although Sun Yuchen himself provided sufficient liquidity for TUSD with financial assistance from his own assets and protected the interests of all TUSD holders, the incident exposed serious loopholes in the trust industry. He called on Hong Kong regulators to severely punish scammers and reform industry norms.

data.title: Gate.io Launchpool Lists Legacy Network (LGCT)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate.io will start LGCT staking mining from 15:00 on April 5 to 15:00 on April 10 (UTC+8). Staking LGCT and USDT to participate in Launchpool will allow you to share 12,500 LGCT airdrops for free. Among them, the expected annualized return of USDT new user pool is 101.29%, and the expected annualized return of LGCT mining pool is 608.33%. Early staking is now open.

data.title: Justin Sun: Call on FDT to hire a third-party auditing agency to audit it
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Justin Sun said in the press conference that he has called on FDT to hire a third-party auditing agency to audit it, "I believe the audit results will show that FDT is in a state of insolvency."
